tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "LAN_SUBNET"
set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "block_icmp_internal_to_wan"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "Port1"
set srcaddr "LAN_SUBNET"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set service "PING"
set schedule "always"
set logtraffic all
next
end
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier": "FortiGate7.0.14-1", "command": "config firewall policy
edit 2
set name "allow_lan_to_wan"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "LAN_SUBNET"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
edit 3
set name "deny_nonlan_to_wan"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier": "cisco-switch", "command": "configure terminal
ip routing
interface Gi0/2
ip verify unicast source reachable-via rx
exit
interface Gi0/3
ip verify unicast source reachable-via rx
exit
interface Gi1/0
ip verify unicast source reachable-via rx
exit
interface Gi1/1
ip verify unicast source reachable-via rx
exit
interface Gi1/3
ip verify unicast source reachable-via rx
exit
end
write memory
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
enable
Switch#configure terminal
Enter configuration commands, one per line.  End with CNTL/Z.

                            ^

                            ^

                            ^

                            ^
